item.title: The Bobbitt Case That Shocked The World
item.description: In 1993, Lorena Bobbitt injured her husband, John Wayne Bobbitt, following years of marital conflict and allegations of abuse. The highly publicized trials that followed captivated the world, sparked widespread debate about domestic violence and the justice system, and became one of the most talked-about legal cases of the 1990s.

media:content.media:title: The Bobbitt Case That Shocked The World
media:content.media:description: In 1993, Lorena Bobbitt injured her husband, John Wayne Bobbitt, following years of marital conflict and allegations of abuse. The highly publicized trials that followed captivated the world, sparked widespread debate about domestic violence and the justice system, and became one of the most talked-about legal cases of the 1990s.

item.title: The Unbelievable Story Of The Ant Hill Kids Cult
item.description: Led by Roch Thériault, the Ant Hill Kids cult subjected followers to years of horrific abuse, torture, and bizarre pseudo-medical procedures in rural Canada during the 1970s and 1980s. The group's crimes remained hidden until survivors escaped and exposed one of the most disturbing cult cases in Canadian history.

media:content.media:title: The Unbelievable Story Of The Ant Hill Kids Cult
media:content.media:description: Led by Roch Thériault, the Ant Hill Kids cult subjected followers to years of horrific abuse, torture, and bizarre pseudo-medical procedures in rural Canada during the 1970s and 1980s. The group's crimes remained hidden until survivors escaped and exposed one of the most disturbing cult cases in Canadian history.

item.title: he Faked Cancer For Fame And Money
item.description: Madison Russo gained a large following on TikTok by claiming she was battling terminal cancer, raising thousands of dollars in donations. Investigators later alleged the diagnoses and medical records were fabricated, leading to fraud charges and a case that sparked widespread outrage over deception on social media.

media:content.media:title: he Faked Cancer For Fame And Money
media:content.media:description: Madison Russo gained a large following on TikTok by claiming she was battling terminal cancer, raising thousands of dollars in donations. Investigators later alleged the diagnoses and medical records were fabricated, leading to fraud charges and a case that sparked widespread outrage over deception on social media.

item.title: The Bizarre Case of Dellen Millard & Mark Smith
item.description: Dellen Millard and Mark Smich were convicted for a series of murders in Ontario, including the killing of Tim Bosma during a truck test drive. Investigators later connected the pair to additional murders, revealing a shocking pattern of violence that led to multiple life sentences.

media:content.media:title: The Bizarre Case of Dellen Millard & Mark Smith
media:content.media:description: Dellen Millard and Mark Smich were convicted for a series of murders in Ontario, including the killing of Tim Bosma during a truck test drive. Investigators later connected the pair to additional murders, revealing a shocking pattern of violence that led to multiple life sentences.

item.title: The Glamour Photographer Who Was A Serial Killer
item.description: Harvey Glatman lured aspiring models with promises of photography work during the 1950s before abducting and murdering multiple victims. His crimes ended after a failed kidnapping led to his arrest, and he was later convicted and executed, leaving behind one of the most disturbing serial murder cases of the era.

media:content.media:title: The Glamour Photographer Who Was A Serial Killer
media:content.media:description: Harvey Glatman lured aspiring models with promises of photography work during the 1950s before abducting and murdering multiple victims. His crimes ended after a failed kidnapping led to his arrest, and he was later convicted and executed, leaving behind one of the most disturbing serial murder cases of the era.

item.title: The Shocking Case Of Mick Philpott
item.description: Mick Philpott was convicted in 2013 after a house fire he helped orchestrate killed six of his children in Derby, England. Prosecutors said the fire was part of a scheme related to a custody dispute that spiraled into catastrophe. The case sparked widespread public debate and remains one of the UK's most notorious family homicide cases

media:content.media:title: The Shocking Case Of Mick Philpott
media:content.media:description: Mick Philpott was convicted in 2013 after a house fire he helped orchestrate killed six of his children in Derby, England. Prosecutors said the fire was part of a scheme related to a custody dispute that spiraled into catastrophe. The case sparked widespread public debate and remains one of the UK's most notorious family homicide cases

item.title: The Double Life Of Philip Markoff
item.description: Philip Markoff, later dubbed the "Craigslist Killer," was accused of targeting women he contacted through online classified ads in 2009. Investigators uncovered evidence linking him to a murder and multiple robberies, but before he could stand trial, Markoff died by suicide in his jail cell. His motives remain the subject of debate, making the case one of the most infamous internet-era criminal investigations.

media:content.media:title: The Double Life Of Philip Markoff
media:content.media:description: Philip Markoff, later dubbed the "Craigslist Killer," was accused of targeting women he contacted through online classified ads in 2009. Investigators uncovered evidence linking him to a murder and multiple robberies, but before he could stand trial, Markoff died by suicide in his jail cell. His motives remain the subject of debate, making the case one of the most infamous internet-era criminal investigations.
